revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-1-155

A testing technique which indicates if a system is or is not functioning within acceptable tolerances. No measure of performance is given and no degradation of operating characteristics can be measured.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Go-no-go testing}}
